Setting.Name: Ticket::EventModulePost###2000-AutoCloseParentTicket
Setting.Description: Automatically close parent ticket when all child tickets are closed.

Setting.Name: AutoCloseParentTicket::ParentCloseState
Setting.Description: State name for closing the parent ticket (default: closed successful).

Setting.Name: AutoCloseParentTicket::ChildClosedStates
Setting.Description: Comma-separated list of state names that indicate a child ticket is closed. Example: closed successful,closed unsuccessful,done
